package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceMethodReturnsTransportWriterOrGinH() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_returns_transport_writer_or_gin_h"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Services that return `gin.H`, `http.ResponseWriter`, or response-writing helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
